description_long: This is a compact, retro-style yellow refrigerator with rounded edges and a single door that opens to reveal three white interior shelves. The exterior is smooth and glossy, with a metallic handle and a circular emblem featuring a red heart on the front. The back of the refrigerator features a black vented panel and a horizontal grille, likely for cooling and airflow. The door is slightly ajar, showing the molded plastic shelving inside, which is designed to hold various food items. The refrigerator stands on small black feet, elevating it slightly above the ground. Its cheerful color and simple design make it suitable for urban environments such as garages, small apartments, or communal spaces.
description: A small, retro yellow refrigerator with a single door, metallic handle, and visible interior shelves. It features a heart emblem on the front and a vented panel on the back.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the yellow door partially open, metallic handle, and heart emblem.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the depth of the refrigerator and the open door extending outward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the black vented panel and horizontal grille, with the top of the door visible.
description_view_3: Right-rear view showing the open door and three white interior shelves inside the refrigerator.
attribute_brand_logo: A circular emblem with a red heart in the center, located on the upper front of the door.
attribute_door_handle_style: Protruding metallic handle, vertically oriented and attached to the left side of the door.
attribute_vent_or_grille_pattern: Rectangular black vent with a grid of small circular perforations on the upper rear, and a horizontal grille below it.
